Event: The Spartan Adventure
Event Date: 23/04/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: E77
Oath of Honor Engraving

Enhancement: 1
Once in a while, the engraving's owner and 2 allied units with the greatest damage go into a frenzy for 3 sec. Their size increases, and all of their stats also increase by 10% / 11% / 12% / 13% / 15% / 17% / 20% for 3 sec. During that time, they also have 1 negative effects removed from them every second.

Enhancement: 2
11000 Armor from the gems
Once in a while, the engraving's owner and 2 allied units with the greatest damage go into a frenzy for 4 sec. Their size increases, and all of their stats also increase by 15% / 16% / 17% / 18% / 20% / 22% / 25% for 4 sec. For that duration, they become immune to negative effects, and they also have 1 negative effects removed from them every second.

Enhancement: 3
22000 Armor from the gems
Once in a while, the engraving's owner and 2 allied units with the greatest damage go into a frenzy for 5 sec. Their size increases, and all of their stats also increase by 20% / 22% / 23% / 25% / 27% / 30% for 5 sec. For that duration, they become immune to negative effects, take 30% / 31% / 32% / 33% / 35% / 37% / 40% less damage, and they also have 2 negative effects removed from them every second.

Requirements:
